calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
David Foran, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Victor Lopez.
Erin Dougherty, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendants: Damian Maldonado and Rosa Zarate.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305-B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed settlement agreement "Stipulation for Conditional Entry of Future Judgment", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
Trial Date vacated.
